title: Double Walled Glass Mugs Set of 2-250ml Insulated Coffee Glasses, Handmade Borosilicate Glass Coffee Cups for Hot & Iced Drinks, No Sweat Cold, Burn-Free Hot Beverages（No-Frills Packaging）
features: Crafted from premium hand-blown borosilicate glass, each Barpre double-walled cup combines elegant design with exceptional durability. These 250ml glasses are made from non-toxic, lead-free material and expertly engineered to withstand rapid temperature changes of up to 150°C. Perfect for both hot and cold beverages, they retain the temperature of your drink while keeping the exterior comfortable to hold.

Thanks to the innovative double-wall construction, these cups effectively insulate your drinks—keeping coffee hot and iced beverages chilled for longer. The air gap between the walls minimises heat transfer, meaning no more condensation with cold drinks and no need for coasters with hot ones. Even after 24 hours in the freezer, they can safely handle boiling water without cracking.

Each glass is mouth-blown by skilled artisans, resulting in a light, crystal-clear finish with a smooth rim for a refined drinking experience. The subtle base dimple is a natural mark of traditional glassblowing craftsmanship—a testament to its handmade quality, not a flaw.

With their minimalist look and practical performance, these glasses are perfect for daily use or as a thoughtful gift. The set comes presented in a tasteful gift box, making it suitable for any occasion—from dinner parties to afternoon tea.

You will receive two 250ml double-walled glasses. Barpre offers an 18-month warranty against manufacturing defects, ensuring peace of mind with your purchase. Hand washing is recommended to preserve the clarity and longevity of the glasses.
description: Barpre Double Walled Glass Mugs Set of 2 - 250ml Insulated Coffee Glasses, Handmade Borosilicate Glass Coffee Cups for Hot & Iced Drinks, No Sweat Cold, Burn-Free Hot Beverages
